title: Verilog parameters with division cause width lint warnings

features.name: parameter division causing width inference mismatch
features.description: Code should include a localparam defined as division of another parameter, where the result's width is larger than needed

features.name: clog2 of parameter with division
features.description: Code should include $clog2 applied to a parameter computed via division, where width calculation may be incorrect

features.name: comparison between undersized reg and division-based parameter
features.description: Code should include a comparison between a register with width derived from $clog2 and a parameter defined via division

features.name: workaround using part-select to narrow parameter width
features.description: Code should include a workaround where a parameter width is explicitly narrowed using part-select after division
